description: Approximate active tcpreplay execution window reported for the ten-probe stress test.
collection or derivation: Derived from the original experiment notes and replay-monitoring output.
notes: Original raw replay logs were not retained after the infrastructure rebuild.

description: Approximate replay traffic rate sustained during the ten-probe stress test.
collection or derivation: Derived from original tcpreplay/monitoring observations.
notes: Used in the manuscript to characterize the stress workload.

description: Mean packet rate during the ten-probe replay workload.
collection or derivation: Derived from original replay-monitoring observations.

description: Peak packet rate observed during the ten-probe replay workload.
collection or derivation: Derived from original replay-monitoring observations.

description: Approximate peak aggregate Kafka consumer lag across the nids-logs topic.
collection or derivation: Derived from original Kafka consumer lag observations.
notes: Reported as approximately 1.31e7 records in the manuscript.

description: Approximate time required after traffic generation stopped for the accumulated backlog to drain.
collection or derivation: Derived from original Kafka lag observations.
notes: Represents post-ingestion drain time, not active traffic generation time.

description: Approximate disk usage before or at the start of the stress/backlog interval.
collection or derivation: Derived from central-node monitoring observations.
notes: Used to characterize storage pressure during backlog formation.

description: Approximate disk usage after sustained backlog accumulation.
collection or derivation: Derived from central-node monitoring observations.
notes: Used to characterize storage pressure during backlog formation.

description: Increase in disk usage during the stress/backlog interval.
collection or derivation: Calculated as disk_usage_end minus disk_usage_start.
notes: Derived from the 60 GiB to 84 GiB change.

description: Median Logstash CPU utilization during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.
notes: Docker CPU percentage; values can exceed 100% on multi-vCPU hosts.

description: 95th percentile Logstash CPU utilization during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.
notes: Docker CPU percentage; values can exceed 100% on multi-vCPU hosts.

description: Peak Logstash CPU utilization during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.
notes: Approximately 1.46 vCPU on a 2 vCPU host.

description: Median CPU utilization of OpenSearch node 1 during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: 95th percentile CPU utilization of OpenSearch node 1 during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: Peak CPU utilization of OpenSearch node 1 during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: Median CPU utilization of OpenSearch node 2 during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: 95th percentile CPU utilization of OpenSearch node 2 during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: Peak CPU utilization of OpenSearch node 2 during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.
notes: Docker CPU percentage; values can exceed 100% on multi-vCPU hosts.

description: Median Kafka CPU utilization during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: 95th percentile Kafka CPU utilization during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: Peak Kafka CPU utilization during the ten-probe run.
collection or derivation: Calculated from docker stats samples collected by central-monitor.sh.

description: Sampling interval used by the central-node docker stats monitoring script.
collection or derivation: Read from central-monitor.sh.

description: Sampling interval used by the Kubernetes pod resource monitoring script.
collection or derivation: Read from probe-monitoring-10.sh.

description: Replay pod logs were captured with kubectl logs -f --timestamps.
collection or derivation: Read from host-dev-8-10-replicas.sh.
